title: Bulgaria — Application for Issuance of a National ID Card
description: The Ministerstvo na vatreshnite raboti's (MVR, Bulgaria's Ministry of Interior) "Заявление за издаване на документи за самоличност на български граждани" (Application for Issuance of Identity Documents for Bulgarian Citizens, filed under MVR's regulation as "Приложение № 2"), the same two-page specimen already modeled scoped to its passport-family pathway as `bg/mvr/zayavlenie-za-izdavane-na-pasport` (GOV-2860). This schema models the identical shared form scoped the other way: its national-ID-card pathway (лична карта / национal ID card, and временна карта за самоличност / temporary ID card), closing Bulgaria's National ID & Civic Documents vertical (6 of 6, following Taxes/GOV-2821 ×2, Visa/GOV-2830, DMV/GOV-2853, and Passport/GOV-2860) — Bulgaria is only the second non-original jurisdiction, after Colombia (`co/registraduria/duplicado-cedula-ciudadania`, GOV-1616), to reach full coverage under this exact framing, though several other non-original jurisdictions (e.g. Portugal, Iceland, Finland, Sweden, Norway, Denmark, the Philippines, South Korea, Bangladesh) have separately also reached 6/6 since — see this schema's own VERIFICATION.md for that caveat. Models the requested ID-card document type, the requested service tier, an expedited-service ID-card collection-office selector, the applicant's national identification number, date/place of birth, name in Cyrillic (plus, where changed, a separate changed-name line), name in Latin transliteration (plus, where changed, a separate changed-name line), permanent address (plus, where changed, a separate changed-address line), sex, height, other nationality and naturalization-decree particulars, eye colour, contact details, an ID-card-specific validity-period election for applicants who have turned 70, an electronic-identity-certificate (УЕИ) opt-out declaration, the identity document (national ID card) presented at submission, the submission date, the applicant's (or submitting proxy's) printed name and signature, an optional two-row bounded block for a parent/guardian/custodian/other legal representative declaring the application on behalf of an applicant under 18, an optional block for an authorized person (proxy) collecting the finished document on the applicant's behalf, an optional mother/father particulars block completed only on a first-time identity-document issuance, and an address-abroad field completed only by applicants living predominantly abroad when submitting an ID-card application, plus a photograph, a signature specimen, and the form's own printed criminal-liability truthfulness declaration as documents[] entries. Excludes: the "Вх. номер" (incoming/office reference number) and "До" (addressee) office-intake fields, neither of which carries a printed blank/dotted entry line; six "Вярно/Невярно" (True/False) confirmation-checkbox pairs beside the national-ID number, date of birth, place of birth, Cyrillic name, Latin name, and address fields respectively, tied by the form's own explanatory text to a system-assisted in-person counter workflow (civil-status data auto-filled from Bulgaria's NBD "Population"/NAIF "НРБЛД" registries for confirmation) — the identical judgment call already made for the passport and driving-licence schemas' own six such pairs; the five passport-family-only `requestedDocumentType` options and the passport-specific 18+ validity-period election (out of scope for this ID-card-scoped schema, already modeled by `bg/mvr/zayavlenie-za-izdavane-na-pasport`); and "Имена на служителя, приел заявлението" / "Подпис на служителя" (the receiving official's name/signature), office-only. 49 fields, plus 3 documents[] entries. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Bulgaria or the Ministerstvo na vatreshnite raboti.

source.documentRef: MVR "Заявление за издаване на документи за самоличност на български граждани" (Приложение № 2), published on mvr.bg's own "Бланки и образци" (Forms and specimens) static-forms page

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2869 (child of GOV-2867). Closes Bulgaria's National ID & Civic Documents vertical (6 of 6). Independently re-fetched, sha256-verified against the already-published passport schema's own source, and re-extracted from scratch this cycle. See this schema's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record.

fields.name: requestedDocumentType
fields.label: Вид на искания документ
fields.description: The requested ID-card-family document: лична карта (national ID card) or временна карта за самоличност (temporary ID card). The form's own checkbox set also offers seven passport-family options (паспорт, временен паспорт, дипломатически паспорт, служебен паспорт, моряшки паспорт, служебен открит лист за преминаване на границата, врем. паспорт за окончателно напускане на РБ) — all out of scope for this National-ID-vertical schema; see `bg/mvr/zayavlenie-za-izdavane-na-pasport`, which models them, and this document's own VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: serviceType
fields.label: Вид на услугата
fields.description: The requested processing tier: обикновена (standard), бърза (fast), or експресна (expedited).

fields.name: expeditedCollectionOffice
fields.label: Място на получаване на ЛК при експресна услуга
fields.sourceRef: Header, "Място на получаване на ЛК при експресна услуга" row (СДВР ДБДС)
fields.description: The collection office for the finished ID card when the expedited (експресна) service tier is chosen: ЦАО Младост or ЦАО Лъвов мост, both administrative-service centres of СДВР ДБДС (the Sofia Directorate of Interior's Bulgarian Identity Documents directorate). Not completed for a standard or fast service request.

fields.name: nationalId
fields.label: ЕГН
fields.description: The applicant's EGN (Bulgarian personal number), printed on the form as a 10-box grid.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Място на раждане (Населено място, община, област или държава)

fields.name: changedNamesInCyrillic
fields.label: Променени имена на кирилица (име, презиме, фамилия)
fields.description: Only completed when the applicant's Cyrillic name has changed since their last-issued identity document.

fields.name: changedNamesInLatin
fields.label: Променени имена на латиница (име, презиме, фамилия)
fields.description: Only completed when the applicant's Latin-transliteration name has changed since their last-issued identity document.

fields.name: address
fields.label: Постоянен адрес (област, община, населено място, бул./ул., номер, вход, етаж, апартамент)

fields.name: changedAddress
fields.label: Променен постоянен адрес
fields.description: Only completed when the applicant's permanent address has changed since their last-issued identity document.

fields.name: otherNationality
fields.label: Друго гражданство
fields.description: Only completed when the applicant holds a nationality in addition to Bulgarian.

fields.name: citizenshipDecreeNumber
fields.label: Указ
fields.description: The number of the presidential decree under which Bulgarian citizenship was granted, where applicable, per the form's own printed "Указ" field alongside otherNationality.

fields.name: eyeColor
fields.label: Цвят на очите
fields.description: черни (black), кафяви (brown), сини (blue), сиви (grey), зелени (green), червени (red), пъстри (multicolored), or различни (different).

fields.name: email
fields.label: Ел. поща
fields.description: Per the form's own printed note, an applicant who provides an email address is notified when the finished document is ready, before the document's validity period expires, and in connection with the УЕИ electronic-identity certificate unless eidCertificateOptOut is declared.

fields.name: idCardValidityPeriodFor70Plus
fields.label: Избор на срок на валидност на лична карта за граждани, навършили 70 г.
fields.description: The applicant's chosen ID-card validity period, 10 or 30 years. The form's own text ties this election to citizens who have turned 70; not completed by or on behalf of a younger applicant. Unlike the passport-family validity election on the companion schema (5 or 10 years), the source form prints two different numeric options here (10 years / 30 years) rather than a permanent/indefinite choice.
fields.sourceRef: Header, "Избор на срок на валидност на лична карта за граждани, навършили 70 г." row

fields.name: eidCertificateOptOut
fields.label: Отказвам издаването и записването на удостоверение за електронна идентичност (УЕИ) в личната карта
fields.description: Checked if the applicant declines issuance and recording of an electronic-identity certificate (УЕИ) on the national ID card. Absent/false means the УЕИ is issued and recorded by default, per the form's own printed note tying email notifications to "УЕИ в личната карта, ако не е направен отказ за издаването и записването му."

fields.name: submitterName
fields.label: Имена
fields.sourceRef: Submission section, "Имена" field preceding the identity-document row
fields.description: The printed name of the person appearing in person to submit the application and the accompanying truthfulness declaration — either the applicant or, if designated below, their authorized proxy.

fields.name: idCardNumber
fields.label: Лична карта №
fields.description: The number of the Bulgarian national ID card presented at submission by the submitter (applicant or proxy). Distinct from requestedDocumentType, which is the identity document being requested, not the one already held.

fields.name: idCardIssueDate
fields.label: издадена на
fields.description: The issue date of the ID card named in idCardNumber, issued by MVR.

fields.name: applicantSignature
fields.label: Подпис на заявителя
fields.description: The applicant's (or submitting proxy's) name, standing in for a physical signature, per this registry's established convention for paper-form signature blocks.

fields.name: guardian1Name
fields.label: Имена
fields.description: For an applicant under 18, or under guardianship/custodianship: the name of the first parent, guardian, custodian, or other legal representative declaring the application. The form prints no explicit boolean gate tying this block to a specific condition, so it is modeled as unconditionally optional rather than an invented requiredWhen gate.

fields.name: guardian1NationalId
fields.label: ЕГН
fields.description: The first parent/guardian's EGN. Only completed together with guardian1Name.

fields.name: guardian1IdCardNumber
fields.label: Лична карта №
fields.description: The first parent/guardian's presented ID-card number. Only completed together with guardian1Name.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, first parent/guardian block, "Лична карта №" field

fields.name: guardian1IdCardIssueDate
fields.label: издадена на
fields.description: The issue date of the first parent/guardian's ID card, issued by MVR. Only completed together with guardian1Name.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, first parent/guardian block, ID-card issue-date field

fields.name: guardian1DeclarationDate
fields.label: Дата
fields.description: The date the first parent/guardian signed the declaration. Only completed together with guardian1Name.

fields.name: guardian1Signature
fields.label: Подпис
fields.description: The first parent/guardian's name, standing in for a physical signature. Only completed together with guardian1Name.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, first parent/guardian block, signature field

fields.name: guardian2Name
fields.label: Имена
fields.description: The name of the second parent, guardian, custodian, or other legal representative declaring the application, where a second such person also declares. Only completed together with guardian1Name.

fields.name: guardian2NationalId
fields.label: ЕГН
fields.description: The second parent/guardian's EGN. Only completed together with guardian2Name.

fields.name: guardian2IdCardNumber
fields.label: Лична карта №
fields.description: The second parent/guardian's presented ID-card number. Only completed together with guardian2Name.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, second parent/guardian block, "Лична карта №" field

fields.name: guardian2IdCardIssueDate
fields.label: издадена на
fields.description: The issue date of the second parent/guardian's ID card, issued by MVR. Only completed together with guardian2Name.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, second parent/guardian block, ID-card issue-date field

fields.name: guardian2DeclarationDate
fields.label: Дата
fields.description: The date the second parent/guardian signed the declaration. Only completed together with guardian2Name.

fields.name: guardian2Signature
fields.label: Подпис
fields.description: The second parent/guardian's name, standing in for a physical signature. Only completed together with guardian2Name.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, second parent/guardian block, signature field

fields.name: authorizedPersonName
fields.label: Имена
fields.description: Only completed if the requested document will be collected by an authorized person (proxy) rather than the applicant themselves, per the form's own printed instruction; the form prints no explicit boolean gate tying this block to a specific condition, so it is modeled as unconditionally optional rather than an invented requiredWhen gate.

fields.name: authorizedPersonNationalId
fields.label: ЕГН
fields.description: The authorized person's (proxy's) EGN. Only completed together with authorizedPersonName.

fields.name: authorizedPersonIdCardNumber
fields.label: Лична карта №
fields.description: The authorized person's (proxy's) presented ID-card number. Only completed together with authorizedPersonName.
fields.sourceRef: "Данни за упълномощено лице" block, "Лична карта №" field

fields.name: authorizedPersonIdCardIssueDate
fields.label: издадена на
fields.description: The issue date of the authorized person's (proxy's) ID card, issued by MVR. Only completed together with authorizedPersonName.
fields.sourceRef: "Данни за упълномощено лице" block, ID-card issue-date field

fields.name: authorizationDate
fields.label: Дата
fields.description: The date of the proxy authorization. Only completed together with authorizedPersonName.

fields.name: authorizationSignature
fields.label: Подпис на заявителя
fields.description: The applicant's name, standing in for a physical signature, authorizing the named person (proxy) to collect the finished document. Only completed together with authorizedPersonName.
fields.sourceRef: "Данни за упълномощено лице" block, signature field

fields.name: motherFullName
fields.label: Имена
fields.description: The applicant's mother's full name. Only completed on a first-time identity-document issuance, per the form's own printed instruction.

fields.name: motherDateOfBirth
fields.label: Дата на раждане
fields.description: The applicant's mother's date of birth. Only completed together with motherFullName.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Родители" table, "майка" row, "Дата на раждане" column

fields.name: fatherFullName
fields.label: Имена
fields.description: The applicant's father's full name. Only completed on a first-time identity-document issuance, per the form's own printed instruction.

fields.name: fatherDateOfBirth
fields.label: Дата на раждане
fields.description: The applicant's father's date of birth. Only completed together with fatherFullName.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Родители" table, "баща" row, "Дата на раждане" column

fields.name: addressAbroad
fields.label: Адрес на територията на държавата, където пребивават
fields.description: Completed only by an applicant living predominantly abroad when submitting an application for issuance of an ID card, per the form's own printed instruction ("Попълва само от лица, живеещи предимно в чужбина при подаване на заявление за издаване на лична карта"): the applicant's address in the foreign state where they reside. The form's own printed note states that filling in this field does not constitute a declaration of the applicant's permanent address ("С попълването на това поле не се заявява настоящ адрес") — it is distinct from address/changedAddress above.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, address-abroad block, single blank entry line

documents.label: Подпис (Signature specimen, reproduced on the issued document — distinct from the applicantSignature/authorizationSignature fields' typed-name attestation)
documents.sourceRef: Page 1, left margin, "Подпис" box aligned below the photo box

documents.label: Applicant's truthfulness declaration
documents.statement: Заявявам, че за декларирани от мен неверни данни в това заявление нося наказателна отговорност по чл. 313 от Наказателния кодекс.
documents.sourceRef: Page 1, declaration paragraph printed above the submission section
